历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 22512 → 23215 → 83354 (abnormal borderline in 2024) → 38241. The baseline ranking has significantly shifted backward in recent two years, with the 2025 baseline around 38241. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 53 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 49 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 47, a reduction of 2 compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 88th (2025), stable in the 86–92 range in recent years. In 2025, reputation is slightly negative (incident involving a professor from the College of Liberal Arts regarding teacher ethics). Douyin popularity ranking 100th, with average reviews and low short video exposure, indicating no significant increase in application attention. Foreign Language and Literature rated A-, the only A- or above discipline, closely related to teacher training and foreign language majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Teacher training/education majors have divided social popularity (55.84 in 2024), foreign language majors generally lukewarm. The estimated number of physics category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 329,000, an increase of approximately 15.6% from 285,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan, and recruits across provinces in Sichuan, with no local enrollment advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of the 2025 baseline ranking of 38241, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (2 spots), and the significant increase in provincial physics category examinees (+15.6%), competitive pressure further rises. Combined with the expansion of examinee numbers and slightly negative reputation signals, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37505, with a range of 37005–38005.
